name: Italian Chicken Dinner
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Spaghetti sauce, bottled (extra thick & meatless)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a crockpot, place cabbage wedges.
2. Add onion and mushrooms to the pot.
3. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
4. Place frozen chicken pieces atop the vegetables.
5. Pour spaghetti sauce over the chicken.
6. Cover; cook on low-heat setting for 10-12 hours or on high-heat setting for 4 1/2-5 1/2 hours.
7. Transfer the contents to a serving platter.
8. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
